overall.description: A third-person gameplay clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character wearing an Arasaka jacket standing in a small, neon-lit commercial booth. The character faces a barred service window with a colorful anime-style burger poster, surrounded by glowing advertisement panels characteristic of the game's cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: small enclosed commercial booth with barred service window

agents.ego_description: standing still facing the barred window, occasionally shifting weight with idle animation

entered.detail: vertical metal bars covering a service window with a colorful poster visible behind
vibrant anime-style advertisement featuring a mascot and burger graphics
low white storage cabinets with dark handles beneath the barred window
vertical illuminated sign with red and blue text reading fresh and burgers
glowing cyan-blue vending machine or advertisement display with yellow logo

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a narrow, neon-lit commercial booth facing a barred service window. A colorful anime-style burger poster is visible through the metal bars, while glowing advertisement panels flank the scene on both sides. The environment features typical cyberpunk industrial design with teal and magenta artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady focus on a character within a claustrophobic, neon-drenched commercial booth. It begins with the character standing before a barred service window, where a colorful anime-style burger poster is visible behind the metal grating. As the camera lingers, the surrounding environment reveals a dense cyberpunk industrial design, flanked by glowing advertisement panels. The scene remains immersed in a high-contrast atmosphere, defined by the interplay of teal and magenta artificial lighting.
